title: Product announcement email
response:
Subject: Your notes now work anywhere — even offline ✈️

Hi there,

Ever lost a great idea because your signal dropped? Not anymore. Offline Mode is now live in Notely.

Here's how it works: open Notely anywhere — on a plane, in the subway, at that café with mysteriously bad Wi-Fi — and write as usual. The moment you're back online, everything syncs automatically. No save buttons, no "conflicted copy" headaches, no lost words.

A few things worth knowing:

- **It just syncs.** Your notes update across devices the instant you reconnect.
- **Mobile and desktop.** Offline Mode works everywhere Notely does.
- **Free for everyone.** This isn't a paid-tier perk — it's available today on every plan, including free.

No setup required. Just update your app and start writing.

**[Try Offline Mode now →]**

Happy note-taking,
The Notely Team
scoreDetail: completeness: 9/10, tone: 8/10, structure: 9/10, length compliance: 9/10 — All three key points are covered clearly and prominently with a strong subject line and single CTA; tone is warm and mostly restrained, with only minor stylistic flourish keeping it from a perfect score.
